summary: SessionStart hook that runs audit-context-budget and warns on cascade drift. Soft enforcement (warning, not block) to avoid mid-session disruption.
notes: Safe overlay. The hook runs once per session, silently if no findings. If findings, one-line stderr warning + append to .phantom/context-budget-warnings.log. No block, no operator interruption. Maintainer fixes the cascade when ready.

changes.note: SessionStart hook. Reads audit-context-budget output, writes structured warning log, prints single-line stderr when thresholds breached.
Adds SessionStart hook wiring. Existing hooks preserved verbatim (convention-guard + mutation-guard PreToolUse, checkpoint-resolver UserPromptSubmit).

post_steps: Optional: run .skills/audit-context-budget.py manually to see current state.
